description: Use this API routine to return real quantities of a specified GNE device. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr, rval = gnedat(name, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the gne device quantity desired. (input).

string.description: nth real data item required by this model; n must be between 1 and the number of real data items used by the model.
active power in MW flowing into the GNE device at terminal n; n must be between 1 and the number of terminals used by the model.
reactive power in MVAR flowing into the GNE device at terminal n; n must be between 1 and the number of terminals used by the model.

error_codes.description: For ‘STRING’ value ‘REALn’, n is not valid for this model; ‘RVAL’ unchanged.
